highlights.text: Nusa Dua (3N) → Ubud (3N) ultra-luxury signature circuit
VIP fast-track arrival & private lagoon catamaran cruise
Uluwatu VIP Kecak Fire Dance & Tanah Lot temple
Mount Batur, Tirta Empul purification & Bali Swing

itinerary.title: Luxury Bali Retreat
itinerary.tagline: Nusa Dua • Uluwatu • Ubud • Mount Batur
itinerary.overview: An ultra-luxury signature journey crafted by TRAGUIN for discerning world travelers. Experience white-glove logistics, elite culinary journeys, and stays within the world's most acclaimed resort estates — from the tranquil beaches of Nusa Dua and majestic cliffs of Uluwatu to the spiritual heartbeat of Ubud.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 06 Nights / 07 Days Bali retreat (ID-007): Nusa Dua, Uluwatu, Tanah Lot, Ubud, Mount Batur, Tirta Empul purification, and VIP Kecak Fire Dance.

highlights.text: Private Nusa Dua Lagoon Catamaran Cruise

days.title: Arrival — VIP Fast-Track & Nusa Dua Luxury Repose
days.description: Fast-track VIP customs clearance at Ngurah Rai Airport. Private luxury chauffeur transfer to Nusa Dua beachfront resort. Elegant multi-course coastal welcome dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP fast-track airport arrival, private luxury transfer
Evening Experience: Welcome dinner at beachfront pavilion
Overnight Stay: Nusa Dua (Elite Luxury Oceanfront Resort)
Meals Included: Welcome refreshments & curated welcome dinner

days.title: Exclusive Lagoon Cruise & Water Blow
days.description: Private luxury catamaran charter along Nusa Dua reef lagoons with snorkeling. Visit the dramatic Water Blow site. Reserved premium private beach cabana with butler service.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private lagoon cruise, Water Blow guided walk, premium beach cabana
Overnight Stay: Nusa Dua (Elite Luxury Oceanfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast, oceanfront lunch & premium beachside dinner

days.title: Uluwatu Sea Shrine & VIP Kecak Fire Dance
days.description: Visit Uluwatu Temple on dramatic limestone cliffs. Pre-reserved front-row VIP seats for the Kecak Fire Dance at sunset. Multi-course dinner at award-winning cliff-edge restaurant.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Uluwatu cliff temple, VIP amphitheater Kecak Fire Dance seating
Evening Experience: Luxury fine dining cliff dinner
Overnight Stay: Nusa Dua (Elite Luxury Oceanfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & luxury fine dining cliff dinner

days.title: Tanah Lot & Transfer to Ubud Valley Sanctuary
days.description: Visit world-renowned Tanah Lot Temple. Continue inland to Ubud and check into ultra-luxury valley estate villa with infinity pool over the jungle canopy.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tanah Lot temple exclusive access, scenic inland luxury drive
Evening Experience: Farm-to-table degustation dinner overlooking valley canyon
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Ultra-Luxury Rainforest Valley Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & gourmet valley degustation dinner

days.title: Kintamani Highlands & Mount Batur Vistas
days.description: Spectacular panorama of Mount Batur and caldera lake from Kintamani. Private tour through artisanal organic coffee estate. Fine dining dinner at acclaimed Ubud gastronomy destination.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kintamani volcano panoramic tour, Mount Batur caldera, private coffee estate
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Ultra-Luxury Rainforest Valley Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast, luxury highland lunch & fine dining dinner

days.title: Tegalalang Terraces, Bali Swing & Tirta Empul Purification
days.description: Morning at Tegalalang Rice Terraces with private VIP Bali Swing. Priest-guided purification ritual at Tirta Empul Holy Water Temple. TRAGUIN signature celebration dinner in villa grounds.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tegalalang terraces, private Bali Swing, Tirta Empul priest-guided purification
Evening Experience: Private gala farewell dinner with butler service
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Ultra-Luxury Rainforest Valley Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Signature floating villa breakfast & private gala farewell dinner

days.title: Floating Pool Breakfast & Departure
days.description: Iconic floating breakfast in private villa infinity pool. Private luxury transfer to Ngurah Rai Airport with departure concierge assistance.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private luxury airport transfer, departure concierge assistance
Meals Included: Premium floating infinity pool breakfast

hotels.name: The Westin Resort Nusa Dua, Bali / similar

inclusions.text: 06 Nights at premium handpicked hotels or private luxury pool villas
VIP fast-track arrival immigration greeting services at airport
Dedicated luxury Alphard/MPV with professional English-fluent tour guide
6 breakfasts (including 1 signature floating breakfast) and 4 specialty dinners
Private luxury catamaran lagoon cruise along Nusa Dua reef
Pre-reserved front-row VIP tickets at Uluwatu Kecak Fire Dance
Priest-guided traditional purification session at Tirta Empul Temple
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated priority operations and on-ground concierge
Indonesia Visa on Arrival and customs declaration costs
Extra food, vintage alcoholic beverages, laundry, and personal shopping
